human_questions: does borg improve completion for real tasks?
does borg reduce cost and latency per successful run?
can teams trust the readiness claims at 10 and 100 users?

impact_answers.completion: yes, the current gate artifacts show passing readiness and successful benchmark runs.
impact_answers.efficiency: yes, value artifacts report reduced token and latency usage compared with control.
impact_answers.trust: claims are tied to explicit eval snapshots and testable files in this repo.

adoption_snapshot.notes: move to larger cohorts only with continued green gates and rollback drills.

message_map.builder: clearer debugging and pack selection loops
message_map.executive: lower task cost with auditable readiness evidence

next_actions: keep zero-reference audit green in CI
run staged rollout with kill-switch drills at each level
